plugins.name: claude-code-starter
plugins.description: Scaffolds a tailored .claude/ workspace (agents, rules, hooks, skills) and CLAUDE.md into a project. Tuned for a Next.js / Turborepo / Hono+Bun / Drizzle / BetterAuth / Sanity / Biome stack. Provides the /setup-claude slash command and a standalone install.sh.
